data.title: Bernstein Private Wealth Management wins Best Broker-Dealer Ultrahigh-Net-Worth Service at 2025 WealthManagement.com Awards.
data.description: Today, Bernstein Private Wealth Management, a division of AllianceBernstein L.P. (NYSE: AB), was honored with the prestigious "Wealthies" award for its exceptional service catering to the intricate needs of the most affluent global families and family offices. This recognition underscores Bernstein's dedication to providing unparalleled financial solutions to these high-net-worth individuals. The award, received in New York on September 19, 2025, highlights the firm's commitment to excellence in wealth management.

data.title: New multimedia campaign demands bold climate action ahead of COP30. Launched during Climate Week NYC, aiming to engage artists, students, families worldwide. #ClimateAction #COP30
data.description: A new initiative is being launched to encourage artists, students, families, and communities to advocate for concrete measures before COP30 in New York and Miami on September 19, 2025. The campaign is spearheaded by The CLEO Institute, a nonpartisan nonprofit organization led by women, focused on climate issues.

data.title: Aprio acquires Mize CPAs Inc. to strengthen QSR outsourcing, expanding in the Midwest. Top 25 firm redefining professional services.
data.description: Atlanta-based professional services firm Aprio, ranked among the top 25 in the industry, is making waves with its latest acquisition announcement. The company has finalized agreements to acquire Mize CPAs Inc., a well-established accounting and advisory firm based in the Midwest. This strategic move signifies Aprio's commitment to expansion and growth in the market. The deal is set to bolster Aprio's capabilities and offerings, positioning them as a formidable player in the industry.

data.title: ESR unveils MagSafe accessories for iPhone Air and 17 series with Qi2.2 chargers and Find My-enabled wallets. Trusted by 130M customers.
data.description: ESR introduced its latest lineup at a tech event in Wilmington, Del., on Sept. 19, 2025. This includes Qi2.2 wireless chargers featuring CryoBoost® technology and innovative Find My-enabled magnetic wallets designed for the iPhone Air and 17 series. ESR, a widely trusted global tech brand, boasts a customer base of over 130 million.

data.title: Netarx launches new SMS Deepfake Detection Tool to protect voice, video, email, SMS, and identity from fraud.
data.description: The unveiling of the SMS Deepfake Detection Tool by Netarx in Farmington Hills, Michigan on September 19, 2025, marks a significant step towards enhancing protection for various communication channels. Netarx, known for its expertise in digital trust and enterprise security, introduces this tool to safeguard voice, video, email, SMS, and identity from AI-driven fraud. This launch indicates a substantial advancement in combating fraudulent activities.

data.title: 1906 introduces 1906 Spirits, a cannabis spirit with 200mg THC and 200mg CBG, offering a hangover-free drinking alternative.
data.description: 1906 has unveiled 1906 Spirits, a novel cannabis spirit offering a hangover-free alternative to alcohol. With 200mg of THC and 200mg of CBG, this versatile product caters to cannabis enthusiasts seeking a fast-acting edible experience. Positioned as a leader in cannabis wellness, 1906 introduces this innovative formula in response to growing demand for unique and effective cannabis-infused options. The announcement of 1906 Spirits marks a significant milestone for the brand, highlighting their commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions to consumers.

data.title: BNB price could reach $1,050-$1,100 by Oct 2025 despite overbought conditions with RSI at 73.61.
data.description: Forecasted price for BNB suggests a possible range of $1,050 to $1,100 by October, despite the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 73.61 indicating overbought levels. The bullish trend persists above crucial resistance levels, indicating potential for significant price growth in the near term.

data.title: Nexus Renewable Power secures $220M funding and energy off-taker for Project Goody in Plano, Texas.
data.description: Nexus Renewable Power, based in Plano, Texas, has revealed securing a substantial $220 million in new funding for Project Goody. Additionally, the company has secured an energy offtaker for this project.

data.title: Chesapeake Utilities Corp businesses win Stars of Delaware for 6th year, voted by Daily State News readers. NYSE: CPK.
data.description: In Dover, Delaware on September 19, 2025, two businesses under Chesapeake Utilities Corporation (NYSE: CPK) have secured the Stars of Delaware title for the sixth year in a row. This honor was conferred by the readers of the Daily State News. Chesapeake Utilities, renowned for its natural gas distribution services, continues to excel in serving the community.

data.title: NYSE pre-market update: Russell 2000 hits first record since 2021. Kristen Scholer provides insights on NYSE trading floor.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update, broadcasted from the NYSE Trading Floor. This update, presented by Kristen Scholer, offers valuable market insights prior to the commencement of trading. Investors can access today's pre-market update for essential information before engaging in trading activities.

data.title: Subsea 7 S.A. received notification of share transactions by a major shareholder. Details in attachment; compliance with EU regulations.
data.description: Subsea 7 S.A. recently disclosed significant shareholder transactions in its shares as per EU Market Abuse Regulation and Section 5-12 of the Norwegian Securities Trading Act. The company was informed about the details through an attachment.

data.title: ETH price predicted to reach $5,200-$6,000 by Oct 2025 after consolidating around $4,500, key resistance at $4,956.
data.description: The forecast for the price of Ethereum indicates that it will stabilize around $4,500 before potentially increasing to the range of $5,200-$6,000 by October. The crucial level to watch is at $4,956, as it will play a significant role in determining the next direction for ETH.

data.title: Radia introduces WindRunner™ for Defense at AFA Conference, addressing outsized airlift gap with ultra-large air cargo aircraft.
data.description: During the Air, Space & Cyber Conference held at National Harbor, Maryland on September 19, 2025, Radia unveiled WindRunner™ for Defense. This ultra-large air cargo aircraft is specifically designed to address the outsized airlift gap faced by the U.S. and allied defense departments. The aircraft is optimized for volume capacity and aims to provide a solution for transporting large quantities of military supplies and equipment. The announcement was made by Radia at the conference, emphasizing the aircraft's capabilities to meet the strategic airlift needs of defense departments.

data.title: Dream Exchange CEO Joe Cecala hosts webinar on new report detailing market failures costing U.S. households jobs, investments, and innovation; webinar on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: The release of a recent report sheds light on widespread market deficiencies that are impacting American households, resulting in job losses, decreased investment returns, and limited innovation opportunities. Scheduled for September 19, 2025, in Chicago, Dream Exchange's CEO and Founder, Joe Cecala, will conduct a webinar to discuss the findings and recommendations outlined in the report, titled "Breaking the Cycle of Structural Oppression." This report highlights the significant costs incurred by U.S. households due to systemic issues, emphasizing the urgent need for reform in the market landscape.

data.title: Blackstone names Katie Keenan CEO of BREIT, Core+ global head. She replaces Wesley LePatner after her passing.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Blackstone (NYSE: BX) revealed changes in senior leadership in their Real Estate sector. Katie Keenan has been named as the new Chief Executive Officer and Director of Blackstone Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. ("BREIT") and appointed as the Global Head of the Core+ Real Estate division. This update comes after the unfortunate passing of Wesley M. LePatner on July 28, 2025, who previously held both positions. Ms. Keenan, with extensive experience at Blackstone, now steps into these key roles.

data.title: Bitcoin could surge to $136,000 by October with MACD signaling a bullish breakout. Immediate resistance at $117,900.
data.description: Analysis of Bitcoin's technical trends indicates the possibility of a surge to $136,000 within the next 4-6 weeks. Key resistance is currently at $117,900, serving as a crucial point for further upward movement.

data.title: NMHI CEO James Li to discuss tokenization and XRP at XRP Seoul 2025 Global Conference on Sept 21.
data.description: Chairman and CEO of Nature's Miracle Holding Inc., Tie "James" Li, is set to present on "The Power of Tokenization Shaping a New Digital World with XRP" at the upcoming XRP Seoul 2025 Global event on September 21, 2025. Li will share insights on the topic at the event, where attendees will have the opportunity to learn more about the impact of tokenization on the digital landscape. The presentation is scheduled to take place on the specified date.
